narrative_beat: Overhead symmetric of four scrolls in cross arrangement on stone table, each with a prophetic phrase, central golden hourglass

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: four aged parchment scrolls arranged in a cross pattern on a stone altar table
subject.focal_point: a central golden ornate hourglass at the crossing point
subject.secondary: Each scroll bears one Portuguese prophetic phrase in gothic calligraphy. Background P&B.

composition.foreground: scrolls and hourglass in rich gold, crimson and ochre

lighting.rim_light: gold rim on scrolls and hourglass

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: three prophetic actions plus one question

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.content:
MUDAR OS TEMPOS
MUDAR A LEI
COMPRAR OU VENDER
QUEM PODE GUERREAR
in_scene_text.font_style: ancient gothic Portuguese uppercase calligraphy in aged gold ink
in_scene_text.medium: inscribed on each of the four scrolls
in_scene_text.placement: four scrolls radially at cardinal points: top, right, bottom, left

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: Four phrases must each appear on its own scroll, in Portuguese, letter by letter as written. Sacred prophetic text.
